backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application, integrating blob storage, access control, and registry mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the travelogue data fetch logic was updated in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` to query entries by journeyId instead of city name, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc library via CDN and mounting the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Dialog-based admin panel for creating, editing, and deleting travel journeys, with date-range calendar selection and time inputs converting to nanosecond BigInt timestamps.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor to `window.backend` and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing per-city media albums, supporting file upload (images/videos), social media link addition with real-time URL validation, and media deletion.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a city travelogue panel component.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing a geographical city database, supporting paginated browsing, search, CRUD operations, and bulk import from GeoNames TSV files with classification logic.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A reusable heart-based rating component (0–10 scale) that supports partial fills, hover previews, click-to-rate with sub-heart precision, and read-only display.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered 3D interactive globe component with features including timezone overlays, city markers, country labels, solar terminator/twilight rendering, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: A scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog that renders a journey's schedule grouped by day using polaroid-style cards with Comic Sans typography and colorful decorative elements.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: A React component that renders a vintage/retro postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with decorative postage stamp and postmark effects.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for managing location entries (name, coordinates, photo), supporting add, edit, and delete operations with file upload/delete via blob storage.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An authentication panel component using Internet Identity, displaying login/logout status, principal ID, and handling auth state transitions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items as typed markers, with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and social links.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) with navigation controls and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file uploads for songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with authentication and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that streams songs from blob storage and supports external song selection.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: An admin component for uploading and persisting timezone GeoJSON data to the backend canister, with IndexedDB caching and multi-step verification.
A collapsible panel displaying all journeys grouped by live/upcoming/past status, with expandable schedule details, itinerary dialog views, and flight animation/2D map callbacks.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A full CRUD management component for travel spots, supporting city filtering, form-based add/edit/delete, media file uploads, and social media link management with URL validation.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A dialog panel that aggregates and displays bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type, with icons and colors per category, and focus callbacks for map interaction.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel with tabbed UI for configuring website layout preferences such as default map search location, ripple size, city font size, and music player visibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook for ICP apps, managing login/logout state via AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper functions through a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for all backend data operations (journeys, schedules, ratings, albums, maps, etc.), plus client-side geocoding and country name normalization utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens (including sidebar and music player variants), and applies heading color rules for different background contexts.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that iterates over GeoJSON timezone features and returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data, using IndexedDB as a persistent cache and a backend fetch as the primary source, with window-level in-memory caching for fast repeated access.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Provides utilities for rendering timezone boundary overlays on a 3D globe using Three.js, including coordinate conversion, longitude unwrapping, timezone offset lookup with DST awareness, and overlay group management.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that manages state for location search, 2D/3D view toggling, travel spots, music playback, timezone display, and various map overlay controls, rendering both a map/globe and multiple side panels.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for styling schedule items by day index, including computing zero-based day indices from nanosecond timestamps and formatting human-readable day context strings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups schedule items by calendar day, sorts them chronologically by time, and builds per-day route data structures with ordered coordinates for map route rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Travel Travelogue Globe project at version 3, documenting completed steps, known issues, architectural constraints, and three pending sub-steps (3a/3b/3c) for isolating travelogue data by journeyId.
